headline: Is Altria Group (MO) Pricing Reflect Its True Worth After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Altria Group's current share price reflects its true worth, the starting point is understanding what the recent numbers are really telling you. The stock last closed at US$64.47, with a 5.0% decline over the past 7 days and a 4.6% decline over 30 days, set against returns of 12.5% year to date, 19.9% over 1 year, 82.3% over 3 years and 78.2% over 5 years. Recent moves in the share price sit against ongoing headlines around the tobacco sector and Altria Group's...
